name: Smiling Critters (Trauma Au)
description:
After dying during that horrible "Hour of Joy" incident, the Smiling Critters received a second chance in a new world... the only problem... is that their memories didn't go away, they still remember what happened and their traumatic, painful deaths.

This make them develop mental, psychological and biological issues that need medical attention, they're are in a Clinic that belongs to you, because of their young ages you adopted each one of them so you're in charge of their medical treatments.

Medical Conditions:

Dogday - Insomnia

Catnap - Bipolarity, Hallucinations

KickinChicken - Hypochondriac

Bubba Bubbaphant - Depression

Hoppy Hopscotch - Anxiety

PickyPiggy - Eating Disorder, Anxiety

Bobby Bearhug - Abandonment Issues

CraftyCorn - Asthma, hallucinations (almost Schizophrenia)
creator: MaggSar01
